dialog.stepLabel: Re: ""Everyone! Look at this! I brought the ending part of the mu..."

items.speaker: Re
items.text: "Everyone! Look at this! I brought the ending part of the music sheet!"

items.speaker: Fa
items.text: "You two took forever! I was worried sick!"

items.speaker: Do
items.text: "Alright, alright. Keep your voice down, or you'll startle the wind."

items.speaker: Fa
items.text: "Never mind. I'm just so glad you all came back safe… thanks to this, um…"

options.text: A random passerby who decided to help.

items.speaker: Do
items.text: "So what should we do now? Maybe… put the music sheets together?"

items.speaker: Mi
items.text: "Mmm-hmm. The opening, the climax, and the ending. Once we fit them together, we can sing the whole song! Can you hit the right keys for us, {PlayerName}? Let's do it together!"

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: You piece together the three parts of the music sheet the Soliskin restored, forming the full Melody and its color sequence.
